# Page View Time Series Visualizer

This project is part of the **freeCodeCamp Data Analysis with Python Certification**.

## Overview

Visualize daily page views on the freeCodeCamp forum using:

- Line Plot
- Bar Plot
- Box Plot

The data is cleaned by removing the top and bottom 2.5% of values before visualization.

## Technologies

- Python
- Pandas
- Matplotlib
- Seaborn

## Dataset

- `fcc-forum-pageviews.csv`

## Generated Files

- `line_plot.png`
- `bar_plot.png`
- `box_plot.png`

## Installation

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

## Run

```bash
python main.py
```

## Test

```bash
python test_module.py
```
